reviews.text: I booked in for a scan over the phone and agreed to £195 for the appointment. 2 days before, I received a call to say they couldn’t do the scan because I was booked in with a consultant who scans under 12 weeks and I’m further along. That was fine and I was happy to reschedule, but the receptionist did not inform me that the price of the rescheduled scan was £355. I’ve asked for a refund for the difference as I should have been informed and the response of the clinic has been to tell me to go away. When I emailed them to say I wasn’t happy about the fact the price wasn’t communicated to me, I also mentioned that my experience of the scan itself wasn’t good as the consultant pressed very hard on my belly and which left me with some discomfort after the scan. It’s not the end of the world but the response I received was to dismiss the feedback and tell me to go consult my GP?!!? It was super rude. I am hoping they will see this review and rethink their response…
